raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Dr. Joaquin Arambula is donating $50,000 from his campaign funds to local community and educational organizations that are providing basic needs and services to families impacted by the COVID-19 crisis.",
    "The Central California Food Bank provides food to more than 70,000 households each month.",
    "The Central California Food Bank has seen a nearly 50 percent increase in all distributions during the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "The Central California Food Bank is recruiting volunteers and new locations in areas of highest need that have no other services, such as rural communities.",
    "The Central California Food Bank remains committed to providing emergency food to the most vulnerable populations, including children and seniors.",
    "The Fresno State Student Cupboard provides food to university students.",
    "United Way Fresno and Madera Counties collects all funds directly for families and individuals impacted by the COVID-19 pandemic."
  ]
}
```
